## Recent changes

- 2026-07-20 maintenance drained `memory/inbox/2026-07-19-prefill-prefix-reuse-real-scale-perf.md` into `memory/topics/s6a-prefill-warm-start.md` and `plan.md`.
- Real-scale WSE-3 prefill prefix reuse is now measured for Qwen3-1.7B dims / 524,288 PEs / L=8192: 25% reuse saves 7.7%, 50% saves 22.8%, and 75% saves 45.2% (all byte-identical; `n=1`). The result is strongly sub-linear in hit fraction because skipped prefix chunks are cheaper than the recomputed suffix.
- Decode retain interpretation was corrected: retain does not make equal-work decode steps cheaper (~0.02% fixed overhead); it saves by skipping already-executed steps. Correct real-scale end-state comparison saves 34.6% total decode work.
- Operational guardrail captured: device-run stdout is the durable result because worker-side `out_*` artifact dirs do not return to the login node; every per-point device batch should tee logs.
- Open follow-up: finish the in-flight L=16,384 k>0 prefill reuse points and decode L=4096 pair after cluster recovery.
- Prior 2026-07-19 maintenance drained `memory/inbox/2026-07-19-s6a-prefill-warm-start-bringup.md` into the new topic `memory/topics/s6a-prefill-warm-start.md` and `plan.md`.
- Durable constraint: every per-column x-chain payload must be EVEN — an odd-extent async `fabin → fabout` `@mov16` silently deadlocks WSE-3 (skill: `csl-odd-extent-fabric-forward-hang`).
- Prior 2026-07-18 maintenance drained `memory/inbox/2026-07-16-fabric-no-keyed-routing-orchestration.md` into `memory/topics/csl-control-payload-mechanisms.md` and `plan.md`.
- Durable fabric framing: WSE has no keyed/content routing; KV gather and related ML movements must be expressed as static topology plus deterministic stepper/rotation/chain orchestration, or handled by host logic.
- Prior 2026-07-16 state remains: M0/S6a-decode was sim-verified and captured in `memory/topics/s6a-decode-kv-retain.md`; source of truth is in-repo `milestones/M0-reuse-foundation.md § S6a` + `PROGRESS.md`.
